message:
feat(codegen): Support dict literals as function args and dict with list values

- Add function_call_args tracking in type inferrer for regular function calls
- Infer parameter types from call sites (e.g., foo({'a': 1}) -> d: StringHashMap)
- Fix is_likely_class logic: use AND instead of OR for uppercase check
- Add getTypeFromCallSiteOrScope helper in signature generation
- Add array type handling in InferDictValueType for dict with list values

This enables pd.DataFrame({'a': [1,2,3]}) to compile and run.
